title: Monogate Computation Fingerprint
description: Deterministic identity of an EML module, written by `eml-compile --emit-fingerprint`. Two machines compiling the same source produce the same fingerprint, byte for byte. Phase 0 of the Monogate Verification Network.

spec.description: Wire-protocol identifier. Verifiers route on this string before parsing the rest.

version.description: Semver of THIS document's schema (independent of the wire-protocol identifier).

name.description: The EML `module <name>;` identifier. Empty string if unset.

source_file.description: Basename of the .eml file. Absolute paths are deliberately stripped so fingerprints are reproducible across build machines.

functions.description: One entry per `fn` declaration, in the order they appear in source.

module_hash.description: SHA-256 over the canonical (module-name + imports + constants + types + per-fn hashes) projection. One number that names the entire .eml source.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 with a `sha256:` prefix.

name.description: Function name as it appears in the EML source.

tree_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical AST body, parameters, return type, and where-clauses. Tamper-evident against any meaningful math change.

param_hash.description: SHA-256 of the parameter signature only (name + type, in declaration order).

verify_hash.description: SHA-256 of the (requires, ensures, where, @verify annotations) bundle. Null when no contracts are declared.

profile.description: Deterministic subset of the profiler output. Backend-specific estimates (FPGA mac/exp units etc.) are deliberately excluded.

machlib_cert_hash.description: SHA-256 of the MachLib proof certificate, or null when no certificate is registered.

shape_class_id.description: C-237 shape-class ID (0..75). Null until the genome classifier runs.
